21.reason: // Index error: should use y[n2].a and y[n2].b instead of y[n1]

26.reason: [Error: Loop condition should be i < n1, not i <= n1, because n1 is the index of the last element, so the number of elements is n1+1, but the loop goes one extra iteration]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: Loop condition should be i < n1, not i <= n1, because n1 is the index of the last element, so the number of elements is n1+1, but the loop goes one extra iteration]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: loop condition should be i < n1 (not <=), because n1 is the index of the last element read, so the count is n1+1; using <= causes reading one extra uninitialized element.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop should run while i < n1, not i <= n1. The variable n1 is the count of terms, so valid indices are 0 to n1-1. Including n1 accesses uninitialized memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop should run while i < n1, not i <= n1. The variable n1 is the count of terms, so valid indices are 0 to n1-1. Including n1 accesses uninitialized memory.]
